name: And That's When Somebody Makes Fun of Their Friend's Dream!!!!

issues.description: The Counter effect is completely wrong. The official text describes a replacement effect that prevents K.O. in battle by trashing a card from hand instead. The DSL only has a simple TrashFromHand action with no prevention/replacement mechanism, no K.O. condition check, and no battle context.
There is a spurious Trigger effect with DrawCard action that does not appear anywhere in the official effectText. The card only has a [Counter] effect.
